message.content: @startuml title DRIVER's Class Diagram package "Driver" { class Driver { listOfCities : String[] listOfNames : String[] listOfColours : String[] -- main() debug_main() debug_constructorAndToString() debug_equals() debug_randomObjects() debug_copyConstructor() fillArrayPublicTransport() fillArrayPublicTransport() printingArrayObjects() traceSearchLeastAndMostExpensive() getRandomInt() getRandomPrice() getRandomYear() getRandomPublicTransport() getRandomAircraft() getRandomFerry() getRandomCityBus() getLineName() getRandomTram() getRandomMetro() } } @enduml
